use_cases: Landing page hero sections for SaaS products with global reach themes
Company introduction pages with animated messaging that cycles through key value propositions
Product launch pages featuring a globe visual with cycling feature descriptions
ai_summary: A hero section component featuring a dynamic globe image with cycling animated text that transitions through different words every 3 seconds using framer-motion. Includes optional badge, animated headline, subtitle, and CTA button. Designed for landing pages requiring global connectivity messaging with responsive layout support for desktop and mobile.
